name: §6Chicken
description:
§8Farming Pet

§7Speed: §f+50
§7Farming Fortune: §6+[Farming Fortune]

§6Free Range
§7Grants §6+100☘ Farming Fortune §7while
§7on §bPublic Islands§7.

§6Eggstra Loot
§7Chickens always drop an §fEgg §7when
§7killed. Grants a §a100% §7chance for
§7animals to drop an additional item.

§6Light Feet
§7Reduces fall damage by §a100%§7.

§eRight-click to add this pet to your
§epet menu!

§6§lLEGENDARY

variants.name: Baby Chick Chicken Skin
variants.lore:
§8Consumed on use

§7Pet skins change the look and
§7particle trail of your pet but only
§7one skin can be active at a time!

§7This skin can only be applied to
§aChicken§7 pets.

§eRight-click on your summoned pet to
§eapply this skin!
